notices.title: CAWAB Renaming Announcement — Now Cantonmentians' Alliance & Welfare Association of Bangladesh
notices.body: The Founding Member Council has officially renamed the organization to CAWAB, reflecting our broader vision of uniting all cantonment-affiliated students and alumni under a single platform.

notices.title: Inclusion of 16 New Institutions (BN & BAF Shaheen Colleges)
notices.body: The FMC has formally approved the inclusion of 16 additional institutions operated by the Bangladesh Navy and Bangladesh Air Force.

notices.title: Membership Registration Now Open for 2025-26 Session
notices.body: Life, General, Associate and Honourary membership applications are now being accepted. Visit the Membership page to apply.

notices.title: Annual General Meeting — Schedule To Be Announced
notices.body: The date and venue for the upcoming AGM will be published shortly. Members are requested to keep their contact details updated.

notices.title: In Memoriam — Late Mohammed Sadman Sakib Chowdhury
notices.body: CAWAB mourns the loss of our senior-most founding member and remembers his contribution with profound respect and gratitude.

news.title: CAWAB Expands to 110+ Member Institutions Nationwide
news.excerpt: With the inclusion of Navy and Air Force colleges, CAWAB now unites cantonmentians from across all branches of the armed forces.

news.title: Cantonmentians' Reunion & Networking Gala
news.excerpt: A flagship gathering bringing together alumni from every member institution for an evening of networking and celebration.

news.title: Cultural Night — Talents of the Cantonment
news.excerpt: Showcasing music, drama and performances from talented cantonmentians across the country.

news.title: Scholarship Drive Launched by Department of Education
news.excerpt: A new initiative to support meritorious and underprivileged cantonment students with academic funding.

news.title: Disaster Relief Volunteer Mobilization Workshop
news.excerpt: Training session for volunteers under the Disaster Management & Relief Affairs department.

news.title: CAWAB Signs MoU with Partner Organizations
news.excerpt: Public Relations department announces new institutional partnerships to expand member benefits.

membershipTiers.name: Life Member
benefits: Full voting rights at general meetings
Priority access to all CAWAB events

ads.title: Partner with CAWAB
ads.subtitle: Sponsorship and advertising opportunities for organizations that want to support cantonment students nationwide.
